content:
INCIDENT REPORT
CASE NUMBER: 17-06-1739
Notes/Narratives NARRATIVE
On June 25, 2017 I responded to Riverview apartments in reference to a fight call and shots fired call at the apartment complex. Upon arrival I made contact with subject at the building closest to Willow Street next to the stair well closest to Willow Street laying on the ground. There was a subject holding a cloth on what appeared to be a gunshot wound to the upper left side of the chest. I noticed that the subject was not breathing and I did not locate a pulse. I called for the rescue unit just up the road while attempting to keep eyes on the subjects due to the shooter and gun not being immediately known.
Rescue arrived first and was doing treatment of the subject at which time I learned from SPO Watkins that she was detaining a possible suspect and they were escorted to the side. The subject was then transported to the ambulance and treatment continued. They were transported to the hospital.
Reporting Officer
Approving Supervisor
(5731) G GILCHRIST
(3050) M YOUNG
Printed By (8245) J NORRIS
Date / Time 06/26/2017
Page 3 of 3
Athens-Clarke County Police Department 3035 Lexington Rd Athens, Georgia 30605 Printed, 3/23/2018 (706) 613-3883 PM BY VASSAK
